subcodes.first_line: O true trustee! The letter dated the fifth of Sha'ban, and another dated the eleventh of Sha'ban, and another [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین حقیقی نامه بتاریخ پنجم شعبان و دیگری بتاریخ یازدهم شعبان و دیگری
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures
